title: Lemon Garlic Chicken
description: Juicy chicken thighs roasted with lemon and plenty of garlic. Bright, simple, and the whole house smells wonderful.
instructions: Pat the chicken dry and season it all over with the salt, pepper, and oregano.
Whisk the lemon juice and olive oil together in a large baking dish.
Add the chicken skin-side up, and tuck the garlic and lemon slices around it.
Roast for 30 to 35 minutes, until the skin is golden and the juices run clear.
Rest for 5 minutes, then spoon the pan juices over the top and serve.
notes: Spoon the pan juices over rice or bread — that's the best part.
leftovers: Keeps 3 days in the refrigerator. Wonderful chopped over a salad for lunch.
storage: Store in a covered dish in the refrigerator. Reheat covered in a 325°F oven until warm.
whyWeChoseThis: One pan and 45 minutes, start to finish.
Simple ingredients from a single Publix trip.
